channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Michigan, Ohio State fight broken up with police pepper spray after Wolverines stun Buckeyes 13-10
item.description: COLUMBUS, Ohio (AP) — A fight broke out at midfield after Michigan stunned No. 2 Ohio State 13-10 on Saturday as Wolverines players attempted to plant their flag and were met by Buckeyes who confronted them.
item.dc:creator: MITCH STACY, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Andrew Luck returns to Stanford as the GM of the football program
item.description: STANFORD, Calif. (AP) — Andrew Luck is returning to Stanford in hopes of turning around a struggling football program that he once helped become a national power.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: No. 6 Georgia rallies to beat Georgia Tech 44-42 in eighth overtime, bolsters playoff hopes
item.description: ATHENS, Ga. (AP) — Freshman Nate Frazier ran for a 2-point conversion in the eighth overtime of a marathon for the ages after No. 6 Georgia pulled off an improbable fourth-quarter comeback, giving the Bulldogs a 44-42 victory over Georgia Tech on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: PAUL NEWBERRY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Colorado State advances to MW volleyball final and will take the court against San Jose State
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Colorado State coach Emily Kohan said her team will take the floor rather than become the latest team to forfeit against San Jose State after the top-seeded Rams advanced to the Mountain West volleyball tournament final on Friday.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Giants' Dexter Lawrence suffers dislocated elbow as team's miserable season continues
item.description: The New York Giants' abysmal season took yet another big hit on Thursday, as star defensive tackle Dexter Lawrence dislocated his elbow and will be out the rest of the year.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Tom Brady questions Daniel Jones' request for release from Giants after demotion
item.description: Tom Brady is in his first season as lead analyst for FOX’s NFL coverage and was in the broadcast booth during the Thanksgiving Day game between the Giants and Cowboys.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Colorado's Shedeur Sanders, Travis Hunter shine in likely final home game before going to NFL
item.description: Shedeur Sanders and Travis Hunter gave Colorado Buffaloes fans an awesome farewell, connecting for three touchdowns on Friday afternoon.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Taylor Swift spends Black Friday amid sea of red as boyfriend Travis Kelce's Chiefs face the Raiders
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Pop superstar Taylor Swift was spending Black Friday amid a sea of red to watch her boyfriend, Travis Kelce, and the rest of the Kansas City Chiefs as they played the Las Vegas Raiders in a chilly matinee at Arrowhead Stadium.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Hall's fifth career hat trick leads Blackhawks over Stars 6-2
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Taylor Hall scored his fifth career hat trick, Connor Bedard, Teuvo Teravainen and Louis Crevier also scored, and the Chicago Blackhawks beat the Dallas Stars 6-2 on Wednesday night for their second win in three games. Hall’s game-opening goal 17 seconds in set the tone.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Longtime SF Giant Brandon Crawford announces retirement
item.description: (KRON) -- Longtime San Francisco Giants shortstop Brandon Crawford is retiring after 14 MLB seasons, he announced Wednesday on Instagram. Crawford, 37, played his first 13 seasons with the Giants before signing with the St. Louis Cardinals in 2024.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Orlando takes on Chicago, aims for 4th straight win
item.description: Chicago Bulls (8-11, ninth in the Eastern Conference) vs. Orlando Magic (12-7, third in the Eastern Conference) Orlando, Florida; Wednesday, 7 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: BYU comeback falls short at ASU, 28-23
item.description: TEMPE, Ariz. (ABC4 Sports) - BYU's offense took too late to get going, and the Cougars' chances at a Big 12 Championship took a serious hit with a 28-23 loss at Arizona State Saturday afternoon.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
